cards.en: TO — go to school / fly to Paris / walk to the shop
TOWARDS — walk towards the river / move towards the door
INTO — go into the room / jump into the pool
OUT OF — get out of the car / run out of the building
UP — go up the stairs / walk up the hill
DOWN — come down the stairs / run down the slope
ALONG — walk along the street / drive along the road
ACROSS — swim across the river / walk across the road
THROUGH — drive through the tunnel / walk through the park
PAST — drive past the school / walk past the café
AROUND / ROUND — walk around the lake / go round the corner
AWAY FROM — move away from the window / run away from danger
GET ON — get on the bus / get on the train
GET OFF — get off the bus / get off the plane
